Julio's Corner

— Try Something Different —

Aruba's most-loved food truck. Authentic Venezuelan street food served fresh, every night from 6 PM.

Our Story

Aruba's Favorite
Food Truck

Ask anyone on the island and they'll say it — Julio's Corner is legendary. Born from a passion for authentic Venezuelan street food, we started in Noord and grew into a nightly institution that both locals and tourists make a ritual.

Every item is crafted to deliver bold, unmistakable Venezuelan street flavors: crispy patacones, juicy pepitos, smoky meats, and the famous tequeños — massive portions, made fresh every single night.

What People Say

Customer Reviews

★★★★★

“Julio's Corner is a MUST do Food Truck Stop! Ordered 2 Chicken Patacóns and Tequeños — HUGE and delicious, very flavorful!”

US Visitor TripAdvisor
★★★★★

“Amazing and delicious food! Great variety, made fresh as you wait. Awesome flavors and great service. Reasonably priced!”
